quicksight.dashboard.axisdataoptions.Cfn:
The data options for an axis.

This is a union type structure. For this structure to be valid, only one of the attributes can be defined.

quicksight.dashboard.axisdataoptions.Dat.Description: The options for an axis with a date field.

quicksight.dashboard.axisdataoptions.Num.Description: The options for an axis with a numeric field.
